name: video-diffusion-ae
content:
## Introduction

Apply diffusion in 1D latent space rather than 3D pixel space, reducing computation while maintaining quality. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

Apply diffusion in 1D latent space rather than 3D pixel space, reducing computation while maintaining quality.
